description_long: This is a dark green glass wine bottle with a tall, slender neck and a gently sloping shoulder. The bottle features a cream-colored label with cursive writing, and a red wax seal or emblem is affixed to the upper part of the label. A natural cork and a black wire cage, typically used for sparkling wines or champagnes, are placed beside the bottle, indicating it has been opened. The bottle's surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light subtly. The overall appearance suggests a premium or celebratory wine, suitable for urban gatherings or special occasions.
description: A dark green glass wine bottle with a cream label, red wax seal, and an opened cork and wire cage beside it. The bottle has a smooth, glossy finish and an elegant, classic shape.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cream label with cursive writing, red wax seal, and both the cork and wire cage lying in front.
description_view_1: Angled rear view with the label partially visible and the wire cage and cork to the left side.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the plain, unadorned dark green glass with no label or seal visible.
description_view_3: Angled front-right view showing the label, red wax seal, and the cork and wire cage to the right.
attribute_label_or_branding: A cream-colored rectangular label with cursive black writing, centrally placed on the bottle's body, and a red wax seal or emblem above the label. The text appears handwritten, but only 'Monty...' is legible.
attribute_bottle_neck_shape: Long, slender, and straight neck with a slight flare at the lip.
